rationale: The citing study’s core results include multiple interaction effects (e.g., selection × socialization, incentives × monitoring, and moderation of royalty effects), and the cited paper is a methodological tutorial specifically on testing/interpreting simple effects in moderated regression. Given this strong method fit and a confirmed DOI match (10.1509/jmr.12.0420), this is plausibly a substantive analysis-method reference rather than an incidental mention.
